patch_description: Combines the best elements: comprehensive handcrafted gait features from the current program + MotionCLIP mean-pooled features (no random attention pooling) + sklearn ensemble classifiers with class_weight='balanced'. The key insight is that sklearn classifiers (SVM, RandomForest, GradientBoosting) outperform MLP on this small 781-sample dataset. The hybrid feature vector (handcrafted + MotionCLIP) provides complementary information. Class imbalance is handled via class_weight='balanced' and oversampling for GradientBoosting. Uses VotingClassifier ensemble for robustness.
